app.title: No Thankiew!
app.subtitle: Keep your snacks, squish the numbers, and bribe the monster.

home.easyDesc: All chips & cards visible. No timer.
home.mediumDesc: Chips hidden. Spotlight on active player.

rules.title: How to Play "No Thankiew!"
rules.objectiveBody: Survive with the lowest score! Cards give you points (bad). Potato chips subtract points (good). Keep your snacks, squish your numbers, and don't let Thankiew ruin your score.
rules.setupItem1: Shuffle cards numbered 3–35. Secretly hide 9 of them so nobody knows exactly what's missing.
rules.setupItem2: The remaining 24 cards are laid out face-down in a grid.
rules.setupItem3: Everyone gets a starting stash of potato chip bags: 9 (3–5 players), 7 (6 players), or 5 (7 players).
rules.turn1Desc: Pick any face-down card from the grid to reveal it. Thankiew the monster is now offering this card to the table.
rules.turn2aDesc: Don't want the card? Bribe Thankiew by tossing 1 bag of chips onto it. Play passes to the next person, who must make the same choice.
rules.turn2bDesc: Accept the card and grab all the potato chips piled on it. Since you helped out, you get to flip the next card!
rules.noChipsWarning: Out of snacks? Thankiew refuses empty hands. You MUST take the card!
rules.scoringBody: Every card you took adds its big number to your score—except cards in a consecutive run, which squish together so only the lowest number counts!
rules.exampleLine3: Leftover snacks? Keep them! Subtract 1 point per chip. With 4 chips left, your final score is 7 + 15 − 4 = 18
rules.tiebreaker: Tie-breaker: If scores tie, the player holding the single lowest-value card wins.
rules.easyRulesDesc: Chill snacking. Everyone's cards and chip stashes are visible. No timer.
rules.mediumRulesDesc: Snack guard! Cards are visible, but everyone hides their chip stash! Thankiew is impatient (timer active).
rules.hardRulesDesc: Monster frenzy! All stashes and cards are hidden unless it's your turn. Fast timer—if it runs out, Thankiew forces you to take the card!

lobby.needMore_other: Need at least {{count}} more players to start
